title: LSP4IJ workspace folders configuration JSON schema

rootType.title: Root type
rootType.description: Type of roots to use as workspace folders

lazy.title: Lazy loading
lazy.description: Enable lazy loading of workspace folders (discover as files are opened)

markers.title: Root markers
markers.description: Marker files/folders to search for when discovering workspace folders (e.g., .git, pyproject.toml, pom.xml). When specified, workspace folders are discovered dynamically by walking up the directory tree, and rootType is automatically set to MARKERS.
